title: CCDR: Volume 50-11, November 2024: Influenza Vaccination - Canada.ca
content:
## CCDR: Volume 50-11, November 2024: Influenza Vaccination
- Information for authors
The PDF for this issue has been updated as of December 3, 2024  with a new catalogue number.
Advisory Committee Statement
Summary of the National Advisory Committee on Immunization (NACI) Seasonal Influenza Vaccine Statement for 2024–2025 A Gil, W Siu, J Papenburg on behalf of the National Advisory Committee on Immunization (NACI)
Summary of the National Advisory Committee on Immunization (NACI) Supplemental Guidance on Influenza Vaccination in Adults 65 Years of Age and Older P Doyon-Plourde, A Sinilaite, J Papenburg on behalf of the National Advisory Committee on Immunization (NACI)
National Influenza Annual Report 2023–2024: A focus on influenza B and public health implications M Ben Moussa, A Nwosu, K Schmidt, S Buckrell, A Rahal, L Lee, A Shane, N Bastien
Perspectives on blastomycosis in Canada in the face of climate change A Khadilkar, L Waddell, ES Acheson, NH Ogden
Locally acquired typhoid fever outbreak linked to chronic carriage in Ottawa, Canada, 2018–2022 J Zhang, A Jolly, T Nguyen, M Taha, C Lee, A Corbeil, E Dapaah, J Walker, C Cooper, J Willmore
